rustWorkspace.name: nf-shell-mac
rustWorkspace.role: macOS native shell — 4-panel desktop, owns source.json writes

rustWorkspace.name: nf-recorder
rustWorkspace.role: hidden WKWebView → IOSurface → Metal → VTCompressionSession HEVC HDR10 → fragmented MP4

rustWorkspace.name: nf-cli
rustWorkspace.role: JSON-only CLI — build / record / validate / ai-ops

jsPackages.name: nf-tracks
jsPackages.role: Track ABI + official components + user hot-load directory

jsPackages.name: nf-runtime
jsPackages.role: browser runtime — one WebView, three modes (play/edit/record)

invariants.singleWriter: only nf-shell-mac writes source.json; nf-core-engine writes resolved bundle; runtime/recorder are read-only
invariants.dependencyDirection: nf-cli → {nf-shell-mac, nf-recorder}; nf-shell-mac → nf-recorder; no reverse edges
invariants.cliOutput: all nf binary output is JSON — never free-form text
invariants.trackAbi: Track modules export describe/sample/render; zero external imports
